public_disclaimer: Research dashboard only. No betting advice, no automated wagering, and no live-betting enablement.

hero.title: MLB Paper Prediction Board
hero.subtitle: 每日 MLB 賽事重點整理、paper-only 訊號、已結算戰績與模型治理狀態。

clv_metrics.note: CLV is price movement, not win/loss accuracy.

interpretation.display_warning: Accuracy only includes settled games with trusted outcomes.

root_causes.title: 模型評估觸發 collapse guardrail
root_causes.repair: 正式站只顯示 tracking-only；模型不可 promotion。先修 feature coverage、再重跑 time-ordered evaluation。

root_causes.title: 模型沒有打贏必要 baseline
root_causes.repair: 新增頁面直接顯示 baseline blocker；模型要先打贏 constant_50、home historical、market no-vig 的 Brier/Logloss 才能升級。

root_causes.title: 時間序列 walk-forward 多個 fold 退化
root_causes.repair: 把 walk-forward fold collapse 當作發布 gate；近期 fold 未恢復前，網站只做追蹤，不做正式推薦。

root_causes.title: 重要 MLB 特徵資料源不完整，無法安全進主模型
root_causes.repair: 先做 starting pitcher、lineup、statcast、bullpen 的 freshness/backfill audit；修完前不得把這些特徵 promotion。

corrective_actions: Separate official accuracy, paper-signal accuracy, and tracking-only accuracy on the public site.
Keep promotion_allowed=false until collapse guardrail, baseline gate, and walk-forward folds improve together.
Run feature source freshness/backfill audit for starting pitcher, lineup, statcast batting, and bullpen groups.
Do not promote partially zero-filled shadow features just because they look domain-relevant; require Brier and logloss improvement.

actions.rationale: Starting pitcher quality, pitch traits, strikeout/walk profile and matchup context are high-leverage MLB signals.
Bullpen availability and workload affect late-game win probability, especially after starter exits.
Market no-vig probability and odds movement are essential baselines; model promotion should not occur without beating them.
Injury context is important but must be carefully timestamped to avoid stale or post-game leakage.
Confirmed lineup and top-order hitter context affect actual game strength and should be tracked before model promotion.
Statcast batting quality measures contact quality and batter skill signals that are closer to process than final score outcomes.
